title: Add a basic man page for each driver and a simple module doc
body: This is a redo of https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1933 but this time `Assisted-by: OpenCode (Opus 4.6)`. Main motivation is just helping people who need to look at this (e.g. debugging, forensics) without digging deep into source code, and obviously would be useful for PoC work like https://github.com/containers/composefs-rs/pull/218
